task_description: find all files whose names contain a date

trace.stdout: Checking for more specific date patterns...

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting search for files containing dates..."
find . -type f -name '*[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]*' -o -name '*[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]*'
```
